title: Swordtember 2024
description: A cool mod I'm making this month. Will have daily updates until the month's end.
body:
A mod I'm making this September featuring a bunch of swords. There will be an update adding a new sword EVERY DAY THIS MONTH. I may try doing this for later years, but I could forget

Active development updates will be on my discord, and if you join you can suggest a sword for the coming days of Swordtember.

Current Swords:

Endblade- applies levitation on hit

Reverse Sword- Damages you when you hit things

Heavenly Blade- Right-click to apply glowing to nearby entities

**THE LIGHT**- Right-click to flashbang everyone nearby, including yourself. Cooldown 10 seconds (WARNING: VERY LOUD)

Uranium Sword- Inflicts poison on hit, to both the target and weilder

Steampunk Sword- low damage, low durability, right click to launch nearby mobs into the air. cooldown 15 seconds

Legally Distinct Laser Sword- About as good as a diamond sword, bad enchantability,
 lights mobs on fire upon hit

Circuitblade- pretty bad, low durability, 20% chance to strike lightning on the target on, hit, 2% chance to strike both the target and weilder on hit

Vinesword- if the target is standing on a "natural" block, they are unable to move for 10 seconds after being hit

Aquablade- Unbreakable, low damage, does no damage if in water

Soar-d- it sword, but also plane. low damage, but you can right-click for a small boost into the air.

Rock- it can bonk

Literally Just a Flame- maybe don't hold this

Amethyst sword- makes pretty noises

---------------------------------
If you want to see more mod projects like this, Check out my Twitch, where I make mods suggested by chat: [https://www.twitch.tv/modman337](https://www.twitch.tv/modman337)

You can also suggest things and report bugs on my discord: [https://discord.gg/MwjqnG3UqD](https://discord.gg/MwjqnG3UqD)
